title: Agent·SB
tagline: I'll come to your house in Santa Barbara and install an AI agent on your computer. Pricing on request.

title: Angus Agent Maker
tagline: Drop your phone number, I text you, you get a Claude-powered agent for your business.

title: Solei Sitter
tagline: A babysitter's booking site where the form texts her phone directly. No dashboard, no database.

title: TouchDesigner Kit
tagline: Scripts that interrogate TouchDesigner until it admits where the hand-tracking data lives.

title: Claude Anim
tagline: The Claude logo, animated in five acts, in your terminal, with zero dependencies.

title: Animations
tagline: The Blender models, renders, and scripts feeding visuals into everything else.

title: Face FX
tagline: Three MediaPipe models watch your webcam and turn you into WebGL effects. Your face never leaves the tab.

title: madebyangus Models
tagline: Low-poly laptops and monitors, with paperwork on which model goes where.

title: Fundraiser QR
tagline: Prop an old phone on the table, whole room scans to donate. Turns any retired iPhone into a kiosk.

title: angusangus.com
tagline: My calling card: an ∞ glyph sphere-traced in 3D and printed entirely out of flowing type.

title: Tiger
tagline: A tiger gallops across the page forever, spelled out of the word "tiger". That's it. That's the site.

title: Site Forge
tagline: Five hand-built design systems so a website generator never has to improvise CSS.

title: Gesture VFX
tagline: Neon trails, ghost echoes, and beat-synced clones tracked onto my own footage. Free, local, no AI video.

title: AI VFX Reel
tagline: Feed it a logo, an emoji, or your face — get back a viral-style 9:16 VFX reel for about $1.50.

title: Flowtype Site
tagline: I reverse-engineered andrew.net's flowing-type 3D glyph and made it a generator. Two sites shipped from it.
